calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2015 Continued To Aug-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle McGill for and with (Plaintiff's)Aurea Datangel & Arthur Datangel. Dennis Vann for and with (defendants/cross complainants) Eduardo Datangel & Gina Breiz. Dominador Datangel, Jr. in Propria Persona.

The Court explained the procedure to the parties, assured them that it would be confidential, heard oral argument from both sides and then met with each side privately. The parties reached a settlement and signed the agreement.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)
